name: Press F1
blurb: A podcast. Two friends. Questionable takes, delivered weekly. Press F1 for help — nobody is coming.

name: Silly Season
blurb: Drag drivers into seats they will never get. Driver market rumors, treated with the seriousness they deserve. None.

name: Safety Car
blurb: Watch the race late, react live. The bot holds the group's comments and replays them lap-by-lap when you catch up. Zero spoilers.

name: Pit Prophet
blurb: Call the podium before lights out. Your wrong predictions, permanently recorded. Season awards included.
